chunks.text: Page | 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.D-226 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2026. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Janwari, Advocate for applicant/accused. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Deputy P.G for the State. ***************************************** Learned counsel for applicant/accused under instructions does not press the instant Cr. Bail Application. Accordingly, the same is hereby dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
